entity.label: Euodias
entity.subtitle: Female
entity.description: A good journey, a female member of the church at Philippi. She was one who laboured much with Paul in the gospel. He exhorts her to be of one mind with Syntyche (Phil. 4:2). From this it seems they had been at variance with each other.

nodes.label: Euodias
nodes.description: A good journey, a female member of the church at Philippi. She was one who laboured much with Paul in the gospel. He exhorts her to be of one mind with Syntyche (Phil. 4:2). From this it seems they had been at variance with each other.

verses.text: I beseech Euodias, and beseech Syntyche, that they be of the same mind in the Lord.
